title: 15mm x 1/2" Compression Straight Tap Connector (Known as 15mm Compression Fittings/Plumbing Compression Fittings/Compression Fitting Also Available in 15mm, 22mm, 1/2 inch and 3/4 inch BSP)
features: IMPORTANT SIZING NOTE - Most plumbing products are measured using BSP thread dimensions which measure 1/4 inch larger than that stated, therefore this 1/2 Inch BSP thread actually measures 3/4 Inch in diameter. If your thread measures 1/2 Inch in diameter then you require the 1/4 Inch version of this product
description: Brass Compression Straight Tap Connector - 15mm x 1/2" BSP. Introducing the Brass Tap Connector in 15mm x 1/2" BSP, a fitting that establishes a mechanical joint without the need for heat. The compression process tightens the ring onto the tube, allowing installation on wet pipework, and making it convenient for repairs and maintenance.This connector offers a heat-free mechanical connection, holds WRAS approval, and is suitable for both gas and water applications. It proves effective in various domestic and commercial heating and plumbing scenarios.Other sizes are Available In Tap Connectors.Technical Specifications: Straight Tap Connector Finish: Brass Hardwearing Tap Connector Maximum Pressure: 16 Easy to Use Resistant to Corrosion Secure and Reliable Available In Other Sizes Size - 15mm x 1/2" BSP ;Please Note: BSP threads are 1/4 inch larger than that stated in BSP terms.
